song.title: Oceans
song.presentation: V1 V2 C V1 V2 C B C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) You call me out upon the waters The great unknown where feet may fail And there I find You in the mystery In oceans deep my faith will stand
[V2] 2) Your grace abounds in deepest waters Your sovereign hand will be my guide Where feet may fail and fear surrounds me You’ve never failed and You won’t start now
[C] Chorus I will call upon Your name And keep my eyes above the waves When oceans rise, my soul will rest in Your embrace For I am Yours and You are mine
[B] Bridge Spirit lead me where my trust is without borders Let me walk upon the waters Wherever You would call me Take me deeper than my feet could ever wander And my faith will be made stronger In the presence of my Saviour
[E] 1) You call me out upon the waters The great unknown where feet may fail And there I find You in the mystery In oceans deep my faith will stand 2) Your grace abounds in deepest waters Your sovereign hand will be my guide Where feet may fail and fear surrounds me You’ve never failed and You won’t start now Chorus I will call upon Your name And keep my eyes above the waves When oceans rise, my soul will rest in Your embrace For I am Yours and You are mine Bridge Spirit lead me where my trust is without borders Let me walk upon the waters Wherever You would call me Take me deeper than my feet could ever wander And my faith will be made stronger In the presence of my Saviour
